form.formComment: Recent form hard to fault. Comes off a 38 day let-up. Last run favourite; won by 3.5 len Carlisle on March 8 over 4900m defeating Credo with 76kg at $2.50 in a steeplechase. Start before finished second of 8 starters at Musselburgh on January 31 over 4100m, 2.75 len behind Jpr One carrying 68.5kg at $9. Gets a chance to win. Confidence building win last time and is worth following up.

form.formComment: Recent form hard to fault. Last to post a big 4.5 len win. This track on April 4 over 4000m defeating Genois with 72kg at $10 in a steeplechase. form.formComment: Having second run back today. Freshened for 36 days. form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last preparation 5 of 8 starters at Doncaster in the G2 Yorkshire Rose Mares' Hurdle January 24 over 4900m, slow track; 19 len behind Feet Of A Dancer carrying 71kg at $34. First up last campaign ran last in a small field at Leopardstown in the G3 December 29 over 4123m, 9 len behind Wodhooh with 68.5kg at $81. Fitness an issue. Can make stronger cases for others.
